# Responsible Disclosure

## Reporting a Vulnerability

FitWright strives to stay ahead of security vulnerabilities but would love to get the community's help in making us aware of the ones we miss.

Please report security vulnerabilities and exploits by opening a private
[security advisory](https://github.com/ObaidGits/FitWRight/security/advisories/new)
or by contacting the maintainer at obaidzeeshan.official@gmail.com.

We will acknowledge legitimate reports and address them according to their severity.
